metadata.title: Indian Geography - Thermal Energy, Hydroelectricity, Nuclear and Non-conventional Power Resources

questions.question: Almatti Dam is on which of the following rivers?
questions.explanation: The Almatti Dam is a dam project on the Krishna River in North Karnataka, India which was completed in 2005.

questions.question: The planned Bedabahal Ultra Mega Power Project is in which of the following states?
questions.explanation: Bedabahal is located in Sundargarh district of Odisha. There is a planned UMPP there which has so far not seen the light of the day due to various problems including those of land, coal etc.

questions.question: In which of the following states, the Sharavati Project is located?
questions.explanation: Sharavati is the name of the river that flows entirely in Karnataka. India’s famous Jog falls is created by this river. Other name of Jog falls- Gerosoppa falls.

questions.question: Polavaram Project is located in which state?
questions.explanation: The Polavaram Project is located in Andhra Pradesh. It is a multi-purpose irrigation project on the Godavari River. The project aims to provide irrigation, water supply, and hydroelectric power. It was declared a national project in 2014, ensuring central government funding. The dam's construction has faced delays due to environmental and displacement concerns.

questions.question: Ranjit Sagar Dam (Thein dam) is a gigantic Multipurpose River valley Project on which among the following rivers?
questions.explanation: Ranjit Sagar Dam or Thein Dam is on Ravi River at border of Punjab and Jammu & Kashmir. It is used for both irrigation and power generation.
